metadata.purpose: Intentional mushroom photo data patch loaded after mushrooms.json when the full mushroom source file cannot be safely rewritten in this session.
metadata.notes: Uses structured Wikimedia Commons image entries so the existing image resolver can provide thumbnail/detail/full image behavior and source links. This file is intentionally appended/expanded instead of replaced with a new patch file.
metadata.note: Intentional mushroom photo patch layer loaded through SPECIES_PATHS because mushrooms.json could not be safely rewritten in-session.
metadata.last_batch_note: Fourth exact-slug batch-pack: 25 records selected from uploaded mushrooms.json. Image-only Needs Review cleanup was checked for all touched records.
metadata.append_policy: Future batches should be selected from exact slugs in mushrooms.json or a current slug manifest; no blind candidate slugs.

batch_groups.label: Batch C — butyriboletes, caloboletes, and chalciporoid allies
Batch D — additional bolete exact-slug support

missing_candidate_review_queue.reason: Likely relevant scaber-stalk bolete; not present as a base slug in uploaded mushrooms.json.
Major poisonous caution species, but regional/app scope needs verification before adding as a base record.
Important poisonous look-alike for velvet foot and other small brown mushrooms; should probably become a real caution record.
Generic Galerina candidate; needs one precise app slug/species record rather than duplicate generic aliases.
Useful chanterelle look-alike/caution record if not already represented elsewhere.
Common poisonous lawn mushroom; app criteria fit as a caution species if regionally scoped.
Spring morel-adjacent caution species; useful if morel section includes early morel relatives.
Potential edible/useful Lactarius entry; not present in uploaded base file.
Potential edible/useful Lactarius entry; not present in uploaded base file.
Useful edible/medicinal/other-use mushroom, but not present in uploaded base file.
Common jelly fungus; probably lower-priority unless odd-form coverage is being expanded.

reasons: oddball boletoid form should be checked in UI filters
oddball boletoid form should be checked in UI filters
